title: Decide and narrow Steuerboard role
goal: Resolve the contradiction between Steuerboard's non-authoritative self-contract and external action-readiness ownership, then keep a bounded repo-state/readiness adapter or migrate and retire overlapping surfaces.

acceptance.assertion: One normative decision states whether Steuerboard owns a bounded readiness derivation or has no continuing standalone authority.
The exact Grabowski, Bureau and Cabinet consumers of Steuerboard outputs are tested live or marked absent.
switch-main and ff-only mutation paths are assigned to one owner and are not duplicated with Grabowski.
A tested migration/retirement plan or a sharply reduced keep-plan is delivered without breaking current consumers.
